headline: Korean Chip Stocks Are Trading Like The AI Bubble Has Burst. Is Micron Next?
summary: A single analyst note out of Seoul just erased billions from Korean chip stocks, and the same logic points straight at Micron. Whether that makes MU a buying opportunity or a warning sign depends on one number buried in its next earnings report.

headline: 2 Growth Stocks with All-Star Potential and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Growth is a hallmark of all great companies, but the laws of gravity eventually take hold. Those who rode the COVID boom and ensuing tech selloff in 2022 will surely remember that the market’s punishment can be swift and severe when trajectories fall.

headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Slides As AI Memory Boom Loses Steam
summary: AI focused memory and chip stocks, including Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX), have come under pressure as the recent boom in demand shows signs of cooling. Shares across the semiconductor sector weakened after SK hynix stumbled and investors reassessed expectations for AI related returns. Reports point to cautious capital spending, slower memory demand and export regulation uncertainty weighing on Lam Research and its peers. Lam Research sits at the center of the semiconductor equipment supply...
